name: Undead Desert Massacre
short_description: Venture through a wasteland desert killing zombies and military units as you progress on your journey to close the source of infection and free the cities swamped by the desert from its unwanted inhabitants.
detailed_description:
Undead Desert Massacre is a wave-based, first-person-shooter, where you are tasked with clearing out several areas filled with zombies, and eventually close the source of infection. This task is made even more difficult by military personnel such as foot soldiers, support helicopters, and fighter jets who have their own motives and don't want you to succeed at your own.

BATTLE THROUGH WAVES

With three environments (or stages) to pass, each stage will throw five waves of zombies and military units at you. The difficulty of these waves increases exponentially, meaning the final wave of the last stage will be the ultimate test of skill, focus and endurance.

PURCHASE ITEMS AND SPECIALS

To make this task more accomplishable, tokens and nyron can be used to purchase items and specials. Tokens are used to purchase items such as frags, heath packs, etc, while nyron is used to purchase, and as fuel for, special abilities such as blaze, power beam, and implode.

REPLAY ENDLESSLY

With the addition of statistics which track best run time, runs completed, etc, an experience and level system, and new perks to unlock, Undead Desert Massacre is an endlessly replayable zombie massacring dream!
